content_body: This is our second visit to Cohutta Sunset. Like many others, our favorite part is sitting on the porch, enjoying the view, and listening to the sounds of nature. We love all the fireplaces and appreciate the coziness of your lovely cabin. We have seen two different seasons and we will now have to come in the winter to enjoy another seasonal view! We appreciate you sharing your home. Blessings!
title: Two out of Four Seasons Spent at Cohutta Sunset
